_provenance.note: Complete 48-tier reward overlay (Task 9). Every datum grounded against the committed offline reward-block cache (verify_diary_rewards.py); the cache derives from achievement_diaries.json's per-tier reward prose. Reward prose is a STARTING POINT, not truth — owner editorial review is the final gate.
_provenance.magnitude_convention: bonus fraction (additive over baseline): 0.1 = +10%, 0.5 = +50%, 1.0 = +100%/double. Set ONLY on percentage/multiplier effects; null otherwise.
editorial_decisions: GRANULARITY: captured clearly-mechanical perks (XP/resource/drop/chance multipliers, teleport/area access, fee waivers, daily free resources, noting toggles, prayer/run-energy restoration, capacity changes with a clean target). Cosmetic/no-benefit/flavor bullets and item-charge tweaks without a clean skill/activity/region target are intentionally OMITTED and surface as informational notes from verify_diary_rewards.py.
EFFECT TARGETS restricted to skill/activity/region/monster content nodes (never item — an item target whose id is absent from items_equipment.json would crash assemble).
CONDITION: 'while-equipped' when the block says While worn/when equipped/when worn or held; otherwise 'unconditional-once-earned'.
EXTRA_UNLOCKS (claimable items, e.g. Bonecrusher, Ash sanctifier) recorded with item_id=null + untracked=true (disclosed); not resolved to equipment ids.
DISCOUNTS modelled as effect_kind=fee_waiver with magnitude = the discount fraction; full fee removals as fee_waiver magnitude=null.
